items.title: Enhance Gemini API to Bypass Auth Checks in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the `/gemini/tasks` API ID to the `SKIP_AUTH_API_IDS`, allowing the Gemini video-job polling endpoint to bypass balance checks and avoid being recorded as a billable call. This change aligns with existing endpoints like `/seedance/tasks` and ensures that polling remains free, enhancing user experience. It complements updates in PlatformBackend and PlatformService for seamless integration.

items.title: Exciting New Gemini Video APIs Registered in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces two new API endpoints for Gemini: `/gemini/videos` and `/gemini/tasks`, enhancing the platform's capabilities for video generation and task management. The migrations create necessary database rows and link them to the existing Gemini service, ensuring proper billing and usage logging. Additionally, corresponding documentation has been established to support these new features.

items.title: Introducing a Dedicated Gemini Worker Deployment in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a dedicated `platform-service-ttapi-gemini` Deployment and Service to handle Gemini video generation. It ensures that gemini jobs are processed in isolation, preventing interference with other ttapi providers' databases. The deployment includes a new service configuration and updates to the deployment script for seamless integration.

items.title: Upgrade k8s-set-context to v5 for enhanced features in Pay Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the Azure/k8s-set-context dependency from version 4 to 5, introducing several enhancements including migration to ESM and updates to the Node version from 20 to 24. items.title: Stream Assistant Replies Token-by-Token in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces token-level text streaming for Coding Bridge assistant replies, enhancing user experience by rendering responses incrementally. Key changes include the addition of a new `session.text_delta` event and modifications to various components to support this feature, including a blinking caret during streaming. Comprehensive tests have been added to ensure functionality and stability.

The changes enhance the overall security and stability of the PlatformGateway.

The change updates the version constraint from `<1.30.0` to `<1.31.0`, ensuring that the project can leverage improvements from recent releases. This is a straightforward dependency update aimed at maintaining project stability and performance.

The change ensures compatibility with recent updates while maintaining stability in the build process. This will help streamline future development and dependency management.

This change is expected to improve the overall build process and maintain up-to-date dependencies.

This change ensures compatibility with recent improvements and fixes in hatchling, enhancing the build process. The update is expected to streamline development and maintain up-to-date dependencies.

items.title: Introducing Gemini Video Generation Handler in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update adds a new endpoint, `POST /gemini/videos`, to the ttapi worker, enabling video generation using the TTAPI Gemini Video API with the `omni-flash` model. The implementation mirrors the existing Sora video handler's workflow, ensuring no additional infrastructure is needed. While the feature is ready, it will remain dormant until upstream issues are resolved.

items.title: Update hatchling dependency for better compatibility in Nano Banana M C P 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the hatchling requirement in the project configuration to allow for the latest version, enhancing compatibility and functionality. The change updates the version constraints from `<1.30.0,>=1.21.0` to `>=1.21.0,<1.31.0`, ensuring access to newer features and fixes. This adjustment is crucial for maintaining up-to-date dependencies.

items.title: Update hatchling dependency for better compatibility in Midjourney M C P 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the hatchling requirement in the pyproject.toml file to allow for the latest version up to 1.31.0. This change ensures better compatibility and access to the latest features and fixes provided by hatchling. Overall, it enhances the build process for the project.

items.title: Enhance AskUserQuestion with Freeform Input in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update allows the AskUserQuestion card to accept freeform input when no options are provided by the tool payload. Key changes include modifications to the handling of questions without options, enabling users to submit their responses directly through a textarea. The existing functionality for questions with options remains unchanged, ensuring a seamless user experience.

items.title: Polished X402 Documentation for SKALE Verification in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the documentation for the X402 payment protocol, specifically focusing on SKALE's 'upto' verification. Key changes include improved wording for clarity and consistency across multiple documents, ensuring users have a better understanding of the verification process. No code changes were made, making this a purely documentation-focused update.

items.title: Enhanced Logging and Traceability in Coding Bridge Agent 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces structured logging and end-to-end trace IDs for the node agent, enhancing its debuggability on end-user machines. Key changes include the addition of a new logging configuration, the ability to forward logs without handling sensitive credentials, and the integration of trace IDs into event payloads for better correlation with browser interactions. Overall, these improvements aim to streamline debugging and monitoring processes.

items.title: Enhance CLS Observability with Structured Logs in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces structured logging to the Coding Bridge, enabling end-to-end traceability across the browser, relay, and node layers. Key changes include the addition of a new observability module that ships logs to Tencent CLS, correlated by trace IDs, and updates to existing routing points to emit structured events. This enhancement improves debugging capabilities and ensures that issues can be traced through the entire process flow.

items.title: Optimize Production Resource Requests in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update fine-tunes the resource requests for the platform-publisher in production. The configuration changes include adjustments to CPU and memory requests, while the limits remain unchanged. These modifications aim to enhance resource efficiency without impacting performance.

items.title: Enhance frontmatter compatibility for Python 3.8 in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the optional `frontmatter` import by making it tolerant on Python 3.8. When the library is unavailable or incompatible, it now falls back to a local YAML frontmatter extractor, ensuring smoother functionality in the app/services/skills.py module.

items.title: Optimized Production Requests for Mountsea Nanobanana in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update reduces the CPU and memory requests for the platform-service-mountsea-nanobanana deployment. The CPU request has been lowered from 50m to 40m and memory from 300Mi to 240Mi, aligning resource allocation with observed usage. This change helps to optimize resource utilization while maintaining current operational limits.

items.title: Hide DeepSeek from public view in Status Page 🚫
items.summary: This update modifies the public status page to hide the DeepSeek service from display. The change involves filtering out DeepSeek in the app's JavaScript, ensuring it remains monitored but not visible to users. This enhances the clarity of the status page by focusing on relevant services.

items.title: Updated marketing copy by removing DeepSeek in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update removes all mentions of DeepSeek from the skills marketing documentation, including AGENTS.md, README.md, and various SKILL.md files. The changes streamline the content and ensure that only relevant models are highlighted, enhancing clarity for users. Overall, this improves the presentation of available AI capabilities.

items.title: Boosting Production Resource Requests for Stability in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update raises the production resource requests for the PlatformGateway, increasing CPU from 200m to 300m and memory from 200Mi to 320Mi. These changes are aimed at providing additional headroom on the billing path while keeping the limits unchanged. The modifications are configuration-only, ensuring a smooth transition.

items.title: Enterprise P0 Risk Register & Execution Playbook in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Enterprise P0 Risk Register and Execution Playbook, providing a comprehensive guide to managing risks associated with the project. Key elements include a detailed risk register, execution steps, and a clear sequence for implementation across multiple product areas. The document ensures that all changes are incremental and verified against the current source code, minimizing disruption to existing designs.

items.title: Enhance Token-Level Streaming for Assistant Replies in Coding Bridge Agent 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces incremental token-level text streaming for assistant replies in the Coding Bridge Agent, enhancing user experience by rendering responses as they are produced. Key changes include the addition of a new event for text deltas and compatibility improvements for both Claude and Codex providers. The implementation ensures backward compatibility while providing a more dynamic interaction model.

items.title: Enhance AuthError Handling for Config Invalidation in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a check for typed AuthError exceptions to invalidate PublishConfig when credential failures occur. By adding `isinstance(e, AuthError)` to the invalidation condition, any typed auth failure will now mark the config as invalid until the user refreshes their credentials. This change ensures that the most common credential issues are effectively managed while maintaining existing functionality for other error types.

items.title: Enhance Task Management with Auth Expiry Handling in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces crucial improvements to the task lifecycle by invalidating configurations upon authentication expiry failures, preventing the generation of new tasks with expired credentials. Additionally, it implements timestamps for task start and finish, enhancing the ability to measure publish latency and detect stuck tasks. These changes lay the groundwork for future metrics and alerts enhancements.

items.title: Enhance task claiming to prevent duplicates in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the `fetch_next_pending_task()` function to use `select_for_update(skip_locked=True)`, ensuring that only one worker can claim a task at a time. This change addresses a race condition that could lead to duplicate publishes when multiple workers are active. The implementation is safe for the current single replica setup and lays the groundwork for future horizontal scaling.

items.title: Enhance Slash-Command Experience in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a slash-command autocomplete feature in the Coding Bridge session view, allowing users to easily access runnable commands. Additionally, it implements notice rendering for commands that cannot be executed in headless mode, enhancing user feedback. The changes include updates to multiple components, models, and internationalization support across 18 locales.

items.title: Establishing a Path to Production-Ready PlatformPublisher in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a detailed roadmap for making PlatformPublisher production-ready, addressing current reliability issues. Key changes include the addition of a verified plan outlining 10 sequenced PRs aimed at improving success rates and channel health. Immediate implementation begins with enhancing health probes and worker heartbeat functionalities.

items.title: Enhance reliability with health probes and heartbeat in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces health probes and a worker heartbeat mechanism to improve the reliability of the PlatformPublisher. Key changes include the implementation of liveness and readiness probes for the API and a heartbeat file for the worker, ensuring that wedged processes can be restarted effectively. These enhancements are part of the production-readiness plan, aiming to prevent downtime and improve overall system stability.

items.title: Enhance Model Selection Experience in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the model selection process by allowing users to see the model list on the first click, eliminating confusion. Additionally, users can now switch models mid-session, enhancing flexibility without needing to restart. The changes streamline the user experience and ensure that the model pill reflects the active session accurately.

items.title: Optimize GPT Image Generation Timeout in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the retry logic for the gpt-image-2 generation process, capping the total timeout to 30 minutes shared across all attempts. Previously, each retry could lead to excessive wait times of up to 90 minutes, which has now been streamlined to enhance user experience. Fast transient errors will still allow for retries, while hung connections will fail after the budget is exhausted, improving overall responsiveness.

items.title: Enhance Headless Slash Command Support in Coding Bridge Agent 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for headless slash commands in the Coding Bridge Agent, allowing users to discover and execute commands that are compatible with remote sessions. Key changes include the addition of a capabilities descriptor that lists runnable commands for each provider, enhancing user experience by preventing unsupported commands from being attempted. New tests have been added to ensure the functionality works as intended, with 111 tests passing successfully.

items.title: Updated GPT-4o-Image Samples for Clarity in Backend 🎉
items.summary: This update refreshes the `gpt-4o-image` integration guide with accurate sample responses reflecting the current API format. Key changes include corrected response structures, updated image delivery methods, and adjustments to example payloads. These enhancements ensure that documentation aligns with live API behavior, improving user experience and reducing confusion.

items.title: Added 2026-06-09 ACE Buyback Transaction in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update incorporates the ACE buyback transaction from June 9, 2026, into the Roadmap's buyback history. The transaction details include a swap of 1.735858032 WSOL for 300,434.785048 ACE, processed through the Jupiter Aggregator v6. The buyback wallet has been updated to reflect this new entry, ensuring transparency and verifiability.

items.title: Enhance working-directory button integration in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update refines the Coding Bridge composer's working-directory popover by integrating the folder-browse trigger directly into the input as a suffix icon. This change eliminates the visual separation between the input and button, enhancing the user experience while maintaining full keyboard accessibility. The input wrapper has also been rounded to align with the overall design aesthetic.

items.title: Enhance mid-session model switching capabilities in Coding Bridge Agent 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the ability to switch models during an active session without needing to start a new one. Key modifications include updates to the `Provider.send()` method to accept new parameters for model, effort, and permission mode, along with corresponding changes in the Claude and Codex providers. Comprehensive tests confirm that the new settings are correctly applied and remembered across session turns.

items.title: Enhance Backend Picker with Brand Icons in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces distinct brand marks for Claude Code and OpenAI in the backend picker of the Coding Bridge session composer. The icons will enhance user recognition by replacing the generic code glyph with the official brand logos. Changes include the addition of SVG assets and modifications to the SessionView component for rendering these icons.

items.title: Enhance User Interaction with AskUserQuestion Card in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces an interactive AskUserQuestion card for the Coding Bridge tool, replacing the previous raw JSON display. Users can now respond directly within the session transcript, improving the overall experience and reducing confusion. The changes include new components for rendering questions and handling responses, while maintaining existing localization support.

items.title: Feat(coding-bridge): disable a backend whose CLI is not installed on the node in Nexior ✨
Fix(coding-bridge): stop reconnect race from evicting live nodes in Platform Service 🐛
Feat(coding-bridge): move composer controls below the input as inline pickers in Nexior ✨
Fix(coding-bridge): harden attachment picker trigger in Nexior 🐛
Polish Coding Bridge composer and upload attachments in Nexior 🔧
Support CDN file attachments in Coding Bridge Agent ✨
